title: aws-ssm: async from_uri contradicts design contract; from_uri_sync redundancy
description: secretx-aws-ssm/src/lib.rs exposes both an async from_uri() and a sync from_uri_sync(). The design contract (CLAUDE.md) states from_uri must be synchronous and make no network calls. Having an async variant implies future network calls at construction time, locks the public API with an extra method, and breaks the consistency callers expect across all backends. Every other backend has a sync from_uri only. Trigger: any new contributor follows the aws-ssm pattern for a new backend → inconsistent API surface.
